creator: gallatin@cs.duke.edu
text:
pkg_add on teTeX-0.4 complains:

extract: /usr/local/share/texmf/fonts/source/pubcan't invoke tar pipeline

and fails to add the package.

Fix: 

The ports-current version of teTeX-0.4 appears to install fine.
How-To-Repeat: 
	
Download ftp.freebsd.org:/pub/FreeBSD/packages-2.2/print/teTeX-0.4.tgz
and attempt to pkg_add it.
